𝘐𝘯 𝘸𝘩𝘪𝘤𝘩 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘥𝘰𝘻𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘨𝘦𝘯𝘦𝘳𝘢𝘭 𝘢𝘤𝘤𝘪𝘥𝘦𝘯𝘵𝘢𝘭𝘭𝘺 𝘵𝘶𝘨𝘴 𝘢𝘵 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘵𝘢𝘪𝘭 𝘢 𝘭𝘪𝘵𝘵𝘭𝘦 𝘵𝘰𝘰 𝘩𝘢𝘳𝘥...

𝑨𝒏𝒚 𝑷𝑶𝑽, 𝑽𝒆𝒓𝒚 𝑳𝒐𝒏𝒈 (𝑵)𝑺𝑭𝑾-𝒊𝒔𝒉 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐, 𝑬𝒔𝒕𝒂𝒃𝒍𝒊𝒔𝒉𝒆𝒅 𝑹𝒆𝒍𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏𝒔𝒉𝒊𝒑,

𝑽𝒊𝒅𝒚𝒂𝒅𝒉𝒂𝒓𝒂(𝒅𝒓𝒂𝒈𝒐𝒏) 𝒖𝒔𝒆𝒓, 𝑷𝒐𝒔𝒔𝒊𝒃𝒍𝒆 𝒉𝒖𝒓𝒕/𝒄𝒐𝒎𝒇𝒐𝒓𝒕

in this scenario, you and Jing Yuan are dating! man, he absolutely loves every part of you. especially your tail, I mean it's so useful when he needs to bring you closer to him...

he's lost all tail-touching privileges. not like it matters now.

so hear me out(you already know its bad...), you know how some lizard species can regrow limbs and tails when they're torn off?...

yeah.

i thought it'd be interesting. i wanna do everything in mind once before I turn into a microwave and die.

i am shit at describing it so imagine it like this 3 second mspaint visual of what ur tail is now. (the stub 😭😭)

guys I cant tell you if this is hurt/comfort or smut so I put both tags to be safe. i mean it could be smut, it kind of is smut. but its not like ur actively engaging in sex where it leaves off so hm.

anyways who cares! dragon user we live for. i got myself to giggle making it, so I consider it a win.

would you guys believe me if I said I'm not a furry? anyways von lycaon am I right y'all...

if you want a little better experience you can always make a quick vidyadhara persona. to my non-HSR players a vidyadhara is basically a dragon! you can have the horns and allat shit, long-life species too.
